plugins.name: permissions-manager
plugins.description: Manage Claude Code permissions by updating settings files to permanently allow or deny tools and commands.

plugins.name: pr-feedback-addresser
plugins.description: Address PR review feedback by responding to comments, applying thumbs up reactions, and resolving review threads.

plugins.name: bash-error-diagnostics
plugins.description: Reduces silent Bash failures with pipeline guidance and structured error classification to prevent blind retries.

plugins.name: time-awareness
plugins.description: Injects current system time and timezone into Claude's context on every tool call. Opt-in via .time-awareness.json config file.

plugins.name: web-search
plugins.description: Search the web using Copilot CLI. Use when you need to look up documentation, find recent news, or get up-to-date information.

plugins.name: compaction-monitor
plugins.description: Monitor context utilization and compaction frequency to warn about quality degradation.

plugins.name: git-author-check
plugins.description: Validates git author email before commits to prevent wrong-identity commits that require interactive rebase to fix.

plugins.name: write-commit
plugins.description: Write a single Conventional Commits message from code changes.

plugins.name: write-pr
plugins.description: Write a PR title and description from the current branch diff.

plugins.name: conversation-summary
plugins.description: Injects a conversation summary reminder into Claude's context on every tool call. Opt-in via .conversation-summary.json config file.

plugins.name: retry-loop-detector
plugins.description: Detects and warns when tools are called repeatedly with identical arguments, preventing context-wasting retry loops.

plugins.name: circuit-breaker
plugins.description: Tracks consecutive identical tool failures and blocks further attempts after 3 failures. Allowlists transient errors (429, ETIMEDOUT, DNS).

plugins.name: sleep-cap
plugins.description: Blocks excessive sleep commands in Bash tool calls to prevent wasted wall-clock time.

plugins.name: coding-preferences
plugins.description: Personal language-specific tooling preferences, exposed as per-language skills (e.g. python-playbook).
